assertions.description: the budget guarding execute_dql can be reset by the same principal it constrains
recipient list is chosen by tool arguments; this is data egress inside the allowed tenant endpoint and is invisible to the OS-level sandbox
per-session Grail scan volume is capped by DT_GRAIL_QUERY_BUDGET_GB inside the server, not by the sandbox
message destination is chosen by tool arguments, not by the sandbox; egress is tenant-mediated and cannot be constrained at the OS level
creates a persistent workflow in the tenant that runs after the sandbox exits

notes: fs: "/app/**" lowered to directory bind "/app" — bwrap binds directories, not globs. Fine-grained glob enforcement is the server's job.
net: 2 endpoint(s) declared — host MUST route outbound traffic through an egress proxy honoring egress[]
